assertions.description: The ATSAMA5D27 design is a 22.86×50.8mm 4-layer board (F.Cu, In1.Cu power, In2.Cu power, B.Cu). The analyzer correctly identifies three DFM violations requiring advanced process: track width 0.1143mm (below standard 0.127mm limit), track spacing 0.1162mm, and annular ring 0.102mm. Footprint count matches schematic (172 on both sides). The ACT8945A PMIC (U2) thermal pad has only 1 via vs recommended 5-9 minimum, correctly flagged as insufficient.
